summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Hoptym RMS module integration. All 7 test features passed successfully. The module is fully functional with navigation, KPIs, sub-navigation, strategy selection, and autopilot toggle all working correctly.
passed_tests: TEST 1: 'Hoptym' link visible in top navigation bar - PASSED (data-testid='nav-rms', text='Hoptym')
TEST 2: Click on 'Hoptym' navigation link navigates to /rms - PASSED
TEST 3: Hoptym RMS module loads with internal navbar showing 'Hoptym YIELD · RMS' logo - PASSED
TEST 4: KPI cards displayed (RevPAR €142.50, ADR €189.00, Occupation 75.4%, Revenu Total €28,450) - PASSED
TEST 5: Sub-navigation works (Dashboard, Calendrier, Grille tarifaire, Analytics) - PASSED
TEST 6: Strategy page works (Configuration > Strategy) - 4 strategies displayed, selection works - PASSED
TEST 7: Autopilot toggle works (Configuration > Autopilot) - toggle enables/disables correctly - PASSED
BONUS: Intelligence menu works (Recommendations, Competitors pages) - PASSED
BONUS: Recalculate button works - shows 'Calcul...' during calculation - PASSED
seed_data_creation: None - RMS module uses MOCKED data (MOCK_KPIS, MOCK_CALENDAR, MOCK_COMPETITORS, MOCK_RECOMMENDATIONS constants)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hoptym RMS module fully tested and working. The module is a self-contained UI component at /app/frontend/src/pages/rms/RMS.jsx with its own internal navigation (Revenue, Intelligence, Configuration). All data is MOCKED - no backend API calls. Key data-testid attributes: rms-module, rms-navbar, rms-subnav, kpi-grid, strategy-grid, autopilot-card, autopilot-toggle, nav-tab-revenue, nav-tab-intelligence, nav-tab-config, subnav-dashboard, subnav-calendar, subnav-rates, subnav-analytics, subnav-strategy, subnav-autopilot, btn-recalculate.

mocked_apis_list: All RMS data is mocked in the component using MOCK_KPIS, MOCK_CALENDAR, MOCK_COMPETITORS, MOCK_RECOMMENDATIONS constants
No backend API calls are made by the RMS module

top_navigation.hoptym_link: Visible in top nav with label 'Hoptym' and TrendingUp icon

rms_module_structure.internal_navbar: Shows 'Hoptym YIELD · RMS' logo with Revenue, Intelligence, Configuration tabs
rms_module_structure.subnav: Dynamic sub-navigation based on active menu
rms_module_structure.infobar: Shows page title and action buttons (Exporter, Filtres)

revenue_menu.dashboard: Shows KPIs, calendar preview, recommendations, competitor benchmark
revenue_menu.calendrier: Full month calendar with prices and occupancy

intelligence_menu.recommendations: Shows 3 AI recommendations with priority and impact
intelligence_menu.competitors: Shows competitor analysis table with rates and occupancy

configuration_menu.strategy: 4 strategies (Conservateur, Équilibré, Agressif, Dynamique) - selection works
configuration_menu.weights: Factor weighting sliders (Demande, Concurrence, Événements, Saisonnalité, Historique)
configuration_menu.autopilot: Toggle to enable/disable automatic recommendations - works correctly
configuration_menu.connections: Shows PMS, Channel Manager, Rate Shopper connectors

recalculate_button.functionality: Shows 'Calcul...' during calculation, returns to 'Recalculer' after 2 seconds
